name: Multiplayer RPG
short_description: MULTIPLAYER RPG - The Kingdom is under attack, You and Your team must save the day.
detailed_description:
MULTIPLAYER RPG

The Kingdom is under attack, You and Your team must save the day.

This is a fun and challenging Role Playing Game.

Here is some of the content a customer can expect, and some details about the gameplay and features.

Gameplay:

Multiplayer or Single Player
Multiple Character Classes
Melee, Range & Magic Combat


Features:

Enemy A.I.
Jigsaw Inventory
Equipment System
Quest System
Stats & Leveling System
Passive, Active & Aura Skills
Status Effects
Boss Fights
Save & Load System
Interactables
Shop / NPC

and much more…
